purpose: Operator checklist for validating local Report Workflow review packet evidence before any training discussion.
required_inputs: report-quality-review-packet-*.json files downloaded from the Report Workflow UI
server preview artifact embedded as preview_artifact

required_commands.name: validate_single_packet
pass_criteria: PASS report quality review packet validated

stop_gate: evidence pipeline validation failed
correction artifact JSONL validation failed
ready_artifacts is below the required minimum
reviewer or reviewed_at is missing
required scans are not pass
any no-side-effect boundary flag is true
training readiness validation failed
training discussion handoff has missing files
training discussion handoff validation failed
training discussion decision is incomplete
training discussion decision authorizes training, upload, provider job, or model promotion
training experiment plan draft validation failed
training experiment plan draft contains started execution steps
training experiment plan review is incomplete
training experiment plan review authorizes training, upload, provider job, or model promotion
training final approval packet validation failed
training final approval packet records final approval or authorizes execution
training final approval packet review is incomplete
training final approval packet review records final approval or authorizes execution
training final approval record template validation failed
training final approval record template records approval or authorizes execution
training no-cost freeze validation failed
training no-cost freeze allows AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost freeze summary has invalid freeze manifests
training no-cost freeze handoff validation failed
training no-cost freeze handoff allows AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost freeze handoff signoff is incomplete
training no-cost freeze handoff signoff authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost archive closure validation failed
training no-cost archive closure authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost archive closure summary has invalid closure manifests

training no-cost evidence bundle authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion

training no-cost evidence bundle handoff signoff authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost evidence bundle handoff signoff summary has invalid signoffs
training no-cost resume guard validation failed
training no-cost resume guard does not block service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost resume guard summary has invalid guard manifests
training no-cost ops lock validation failed
training no-cost ops lock allows service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost ops lock summary has invalid lock manifests
training no-cost ops lock handoff validation failed
training no-cost ops lock handoff authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost ops lock handoff signoff is incomplete
training no-cost ops lock handoff signoff authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost ops lock handoff signoff summary has invalid signoffs
training no-cost final hold validation failed
training no-cost final hold allows service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost final hold summary has invalid final hold manifests
training no-cost closeout receipt validation failed
training no-cost closeout receipt allows service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost closeout receipt summary has invalid closeout receipt manifests
training no-cost service lock check failed
training no-cost service lock report generation failed
training no-cost service lock report validation failed
training no-cost service lock report summary has invalid service lock reports
training no-cost service lock report summary validation failed
training no-cost operator handoff generation failed
training no-cost operator handoff validation failed
training no-cost operator handoff signoff is incomplete
training no-cost operator handoff signoff authorizes service resume, AWS cost increase, provider call, upload, execution, or model promotion
training no-cost operator handoff signoff summary has invalid signoffs
training no-cost operator handoff signoff summary validation failed
training no-cost operator handoff closeout receipt generation failed
training no-cost operator handoff closeout receipt validation failed
training no-cost operator handoff closeout receipt summary has invalid receipts
training no-cost operator handoff closeout receipt summary validation failed
training no-cost operator handoff closeout package generation failed
training no-cost operator handoff closeout package validation failed
